# Generic → Generic Multiply

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Generic → Generic Multiply

Generic Multiply

Instruction Type and Width       Instruction description
                                 Performs configurable multiplication between two sources using
                                 CISA. The multiplicands and products signs are user configured
16x16                            according to the configuration register set. Each source is 16-bit

wide. The destination is either 32-bit or 40-bit wide according to
                                 the register type.
